code: class Node{ int data; Node next; Node(int d){ data=d; } } class Main{ static Node reverse(Node head){ Node prev=null,curr=head; while(curr!=null){ Node next=curr.next; curr.next=prev; prev=curr; curr=next; } return prev;} public static void main(String[] args){ Node head=new Node(1); head.next=new Node(2); head.next.next=new Node(3); head=reverse(head); Node t=head; while(t!=null){ System.out.print(t.data+" "); t=t.next;} } }
